questionHtml: Calculate the angle between the first-order line of the red light in the hydrogen spectrum and the second-order line of the violet light in the hydrogen spectrum.
markschemeHtml:
2 × 4.1 × 10−7 = 1.9 × 10−6 sin θv seen

OR

6.6 × 10−7 = 1.9 × 10−6 sin θr seen ✔

 

θv = 24 − 26 «°»

OR

θr = 19 − 20 «°» ✔

 

Δθ = 5 − 6 «°» ✔

 

For MP3 answer must follow from answers in MP2

For MP3 do not allow ECF from incorrect angles

meta.title: Calculate the angle between the first-order line of the red light in the hydrogen spectrum and the second-order line of the violet light in the hydrogen spectrum.
